top.title: Hungarians decide whether to end 16 years of Orbán rule and elect rival
top.summary: Most polls favour Péter Magyar, who fronts a grassroots party, but PM Viktor Orbán has been in a defiant mood.

top.title: 'It's a special thing to be on Planet Earth': Artemis crew welcomed home in Houston
top.summary: The four astronauts flew around the Moon in a nine-day voyage that took them further from Earth than any humans in history.

top.title: Why this disillusioned Trump voter spends hours searching Epstein files
top.summary: Many who support the president have expressed frustration with how Trump's former attorney general Pam Bondi handled the Epstein files.

top.title: Dancer with MND performs on stage again through digital avatar
top.summary: Breanna Olson said brainwave tech was able to re-establish the expression and connection she felt had gone.

top.title: Meta pulls Facebook ads recruiting for social media addiction lawsuits
top.summary: The Facebook owner recently lost a landmark social media addiction trial in California

top.title: White House staff told not to place bets on prediction markets
top.summary: The gambling platforms have grown in popularity, with some users making wagers on conflicts.
